events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: the arc-rated PPE's DOC/ID-tagged cal/cm² category is below what the equipment's arc-flash label requires. Decision is **fail** (critical risk) — work should be halted before start, the label reconciled against the incident-energy study, under-rated gear quarantined, and correctly rated PPE verified before authorizing the task.
